title: Convert io::Error with From
scenario: A From implementation centralizes how low-level I/O errors become configuration errors and enables ? at call sites.
instructions: Implement From<std::io::Error> for ConfigLoadError by returning ConfigLoadError::FileRead(error).

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps config-err-from-io explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
